movies.title: Shadow Protocol
movies.description: An elite operative must navigate a web of betrayal when a classified mission goes wrong, exposing a conspiracy that reaches the highest levels of power.

movies.title: Echoes of a Cosmic Dawn
movies.description: Two explorers venture across an alien desert toward a colossal structure that holds the key to humanity's survival.

movies.title: The Smoking Gun
movies.description: In 1940s Chicago, a hardened detective uncovers a racketeering ring that leads to the city's most powerful figures.

movies.title: Misty Hearts
movies.description: Two strangers find solace in each other on a foggy bridge at dawn, their lives intertwined by fate and loss.

movies.title: Family Feast-er
movies.description: A dysfunctional family reunion turns into a chaotic weekend of revelations, pranks, and unexpected bonding.

movies.title: Aquatic Fortress
movies.description: A team of elite divers attempts the most ambitious heist in history: stealing from a sunken vault beneath the ocean.

movies.title: The Fractured Soul
movies.description: A psychologist discovers her patient's fractured personalities may be connected to a series of unsolved disappearances.

movies.title: Echoes of Valor
movies.description: A platoon of soldiers makes a last stand against impossible odds, their sacrifice becoming a legend that echoes through generations.

movies.title: Summer's End
movies.description: Three friends embark on a road trip during their last summer before college, discovering that growing up doesn't mean growing apart.

movies.title: Whispering Blades
movies.description: In a bamboo forest shrouded in mystery, a lone warrior defends an ancient secret from those who would exploit its power.
